description_long: This is a pair of high-top sneakers with a denim-textured fabric upper, featuring prominent white stitching along the seams and edges. The shoes have white rubber soles with a black stripe running along the side, giving them a classic urban look. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with white laces threaded through metal eyelets. The toe caps are reinforced with white rubber, providing durability and a distinct visual contrast to the blue denim material. The interior appears to be lined with a lighter material, likely for comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior surfaces.
description: A pair of high-top sneakers with blue denim-textured uppers, white rubber soles, and white criss-cross laces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical toe caps, white laces, and the denim texture on both shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the white stitching, denim fabric, and the black stripe on the rubber sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical seam and stitching details on the heel area of both shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the denim texture, stitching, and sole details.
